name: @whollymath/shared-types
description: TypeScript types generated from backend Pydantic schemas (TECH_STACK §2). One source of truth for the API contract.

scripts.//generate: Regenerates src/generated.ts from backend Pydantic models via pydantic-to-typescript (runs in the backend's uv env). Wire the real module path once Pydantic models exist; the schema lives in app.api.schemas (TECH_STACK §2).
